Buyer's question

AI Consultant Austin TX Austin-based AI consulting for B2B operators.

Treetop is an Austin-based AI consulting firm working with B2B companies between $5M and $50M to roll out Claude and AI productivity tooling. Here's our approach, our engagements, and how to evaluate whether we're the right fit.

Short answer

Treetop is an Austin-based AI consulting firm. Most B2B engagements start with the \$1,500 AI Audit (5-day written roadmap), then progress to fixed-fee implementation engagements. We work in-person in Austin and remote across Texas and the US.

By Bill Colbert · Founder, Treetop Growth Strategy
Published May 2026 · More from the library

Our engagement model

1. AI Audit (\$1,500, 1-2 weeks)

Written, prioritized roadmap. Diagnostic of current AI usage, ranked workflow recommendations, platform recommendation, 90-day action plan, budget estimate.

2. Implementation (\$5K-\$50K, 4-12 weeks)

Fixed-fee implementation of 1-3 production AI workflows from the audit. Built on Claude or ChatGPT Team/Enterprise with custom Projects, prompt libraries, and team training.

3. Retainer (\$3K-\$15K/month, ongoing)

Light ongoing partnership after the initial implementation. Quarterly reviews, expansion workflows, ad-hoc questions, training refreshes.

Why Austin's B2B market matters

Austin's B2B ecosystem is broader than the SaaS reputation suggests — financial services, healthcare tech, logistics, manufacturing, professional services, real estate. AI rollout patterns differ by vertical, and we work across the major Austin clusters.

Local advantages:

  • In-person engagement available for the workflows where face-time matters.
  • Connected to Austin operator network — when you need to hire an AE who's AI-fluent, we know people.
  • Familiar with the local talent market for AI ops roles.
  • Located in the same time zone as most US clients (Central time).

Common Austin engagements

  • B2B SaaS companies rolling out Claude across sales and CS.
  • Professional services firms (consulting, law, agencies) shipping Claude-based workflows for proposals and client deliverables.
  • Healthcare practices implementing HIPAA-aware AI workflows.
  • Financial services firms deploying AI within compliance constraints.
  • Manufacturers using AI for quote generation and sales engineering.

How to evaluate

  • Read our published frameworks (see /content-library) — opinionated, specific.
  • Look at our case studies (see /case-studies) — composite, but the patterns are real.
  • Talk to us. Start with the AI Audit as a low-commitment first engagement.

FAQ

Are you Austin-based?

Yes — Bill Colbert founded Treetop in Austin, TX.

Do you work with companies outside Austin?

Yes — Texas and US-wide. Remote engagement model with on-site for clients within driving distance of Austin.

What does the AI Audit cost?

\$1,500 fixed fee. Produces a written roadmap in 5 business days.

What size company do you work with?

B2B companies between \$5M and \$50M ARR primarily. Below that, founder-led AI exploration usually outperforms consulting; above that, larger enterprise firms are usually the right fit.

How quickly can we get started?

AI Audit can usually start within 1-2 weeks. Implementation engagements within 2-4 weeks of audit completion.
